points.text: Caribou Biosciences — CRISPR genome-editing biopharmaceutical company — reported long-term durability data for CB-011 (Vispa-cel) at EHA 2026, demonstrating deep responses in heavily pretreated multiple myeloma and large B-cell lymphoma patients.

Caribou Biosciences — CRISPR-engineered off-the-shelf CAR-T platform — achieved 83% complete response rate and 91% MRD negativity in BCMA-naïve multiple myeloma patients treated with CB-011 in the CaMMouflage Phase 1 trial.
Caribou Biosciences — CRISPR-based vispa-cel (CB-011) — reported 82% overall response rate and 67% complete response rate in second-line large B-cell lymphoma patients in the ANTLER Phase 1 trial.
Caribou Biosciences — CRISPR-edited allogeneic CAR-T therapy — established a recommended dose for expansion of 450 million CB-011 cells for multiple myeloma treatment in the CaMMouflage trial.

Caribou Biosciences — CB-011 (Vispa-cel) — Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma — CaMMouflage Phase 1 trial: 83% CR rate, 91% MRD negativity, and 50% of patients in ≥CR at 15 months in BCMA-naïve cohort.
Caribou Biosciences — vispa-cel — Second-line Large B-Cell Lymphoma — ANTLER Phase 1 trial: 82% ORR, 67% CR rate, and 17.1-month median PFS in pivotal optimized subgroup (N=27).

Caribou Biosciences — CB-011 — Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma — CaMMouflage Phase 1 trial: Recommended dose for expansion set at 450 million cells with lymphodepletion of 500 mg/m² cyclophosphamide and 30 mg/m² fludarabide.
Caribou Biosciences — vispa-cel — Second-line Large B-Cell Lymphoma — ANTLER-3 pivotal Phase 3 trial designed to address unmet need in academic and community centers for curative intent therapy.

Caribou Biosciences — CRISPR genome-editing platform commercialization — CB-011 (Vispa-cel) pipeline — Advancing two off-the-shelf CAR-T candidates (BCMA-targeted for MM, CD19-targeted for LBCL) with Phase 1 durability data presented at EHA 2026.

CB-011 — Mechanism: CRISPR-engineered allogeneic BCMA-targeted CAR-T cell therapy — Phase: 1 (CaMMouflage) — Population: Heavily pretreated, BCMA-naïve r/r MM patients — Comparator: None (single-arm) — Endpoints/Results: 83% CR rate, 91% MRD negativity, 50% ≥CR at 15 months.

vispa-cel — Mechanism: CRISPR-engineered allogeneic CD19-targeted CAR-T cell therapy — Phase: 1 (ANTLER) — Population: Second-line r/r LBCL patients — Comparator: None (single-arm) — Endpoints/Results: 82% ORR, 67% CR rate, 17.1-month median PFS; no GvHD or ≥Gr 3 CRS reported in optimized subgroup.
